commands.name: bun test src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts
commands.summary: RED reconfirmed after second reviewer round: 8 pass, 100 fail, 119 expect() calls, 108 tests. Tests fail as expected because skill docs do not yet contain Phase 3-1 coordination contract text. T04 will add the required text to pass these tests.

commands.name: bun run typecheck
commands.summary: tsc --noEmit completed with no errors after second reviewer round. New test file typechecks cleanly with helper module imports including AttributionMethodSchema and OwnershipCoverageStatusSchema.

results.name: bun test src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts
results.summary: Expected RED after second reviewer round: 8 pass, 100 fail, 119 expect() calls, 108 tests. Tests now additionally assert all canonical mailbox field names (message_id, thread_id, timestamp, sender, recipient, message_type, stage, task_id, summary, artifact_refs, status), all ownership registry/entry field names (work_id, entries, entry_id, target, target_type, owner_task_id, mode, status, allowed_operations, policy_summary, conflict_notes, blocker_refs), security_trigger_evidence notes field, ownership_evidence notes field, all attribution method enum values (executor_edit_log, before_after_snapshot, reviewer_confirmed, pre_registry_bootstrap, not_applicable), and all ownership coverage status enum values (covered, uncovered, conflict, not_applicable).

results.name: bun run typecheck
results.summary: tsc --noEmit exited cleanly after second reviewer round. New test file and helper imports including AttributionMethodSchema and OwnershipCoverageStatusSchema typecheck without errors.

executor_evidence: T03 created and reviewer-fixed src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts across two review rounds. Second round (5 findings) applied: (1) canonical mailbox field names test asserts all 11 fields (message_id, thread_id, timestamp, sender, recipient, message_type, stage, task_id, summary, artifact_refs, status) in plan coordination section; (2) ownership registry/entry field names tests assert work_id, entries, and all 10 entry fields (entry_id, target, target_type, owner_task_id, mode, status, allowed_operations, policy_summary, conflict_notes, blocker_refs) in both plan and execute coordination sections; (3) security_trigger_evidence tests now assert notes field alongside triggered_categories, decision, evidence_refs in both execute and security trigger describe blocks; (4) ownership_evidence test now asserts notes field alongside all prior fields; (5) new tests assert all attribution method enum values (executor_edit_log, before_after_snapshot, reviewer_confirmed, pre_registry_bootstrap, not_applicable) and all ownership coverage status enum values (covered, uncovered, conflict, not_applicable) in canonical plan/execute coordination sections. Suite now has 108 tests across 13 describe blocks. Imports AttributionMethodSchema and OwnershipCoverageStatusSchema for enum consistency. RED reconfirmed: 8 pass, 100 fail, 119 expect() calls. Typecheck passes clean.

diagnostics_status.summary: LSP server not available for .ts extension in this environment. tsc --noEmit serves as the static analysis gate and passed clean.

notes: T03 creates and reviewer-fixes the Phase 3 markdown contract test file and its own verification record.
T03 appends to mailbox.jsonl and ledger.jsonl using shared_append ownership.
T03 does not edit skill docs — that is T04's responsibility.

Second review round added mailbox field name assertions, ownership registry/entry field name assertions, security_trigger_evidence notes, ownership_evidence notes, and attribution method/coverage status enum value assertions.

T03 creates a test file that reads markdown files and imports Zod schemas. No filesystem I/O in production code, no shell execution, no authentication, no secrets, no git operations, no network calls, no dependency changes, no sandbox behavior, and no untrusted-input runtime handling. Security triggers do not apply.
